# AuthorizationRights

**Type Alias**

An authorization item set designated to represent a set of rights.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias AuthorizationRights = AuthorizationItemSet
```

## Discussion

The argument value of each item in the set is as defined for the specific right it belongs to. Argument values may not contain pointers so they remain portable between different address spaces. This set is actually an instance of an [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationItemSet].
title: AuthorizationRights
